name: chokepoint-clickfix-emulation
description: Execute PowerShell with -EncodedCommand flag, DNS resolution, outbound HTTP. Expected: EID 1 (encoded command from explorer).

detectionQueries.name: Encoded PowerShell Execution
detectionQueries.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where ProcessCommandLine has '-EncodedCommand' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine

detectionQueries.name: PowerShell from Explorer
detectionQueries.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where InitiatingProcessFileName == 'explorer.exe' and FileName == 'powershell.exe' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine

detectionQueries.name: Outbound HTTP from PowerShell
detectionQueries.query: DeviceNetworkEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where InitiatingProcessFileName == 'powershell.exe' and RemotePort == 80 | project Timestamp, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort
